evals.prompt: I have a specs/ folder with actor-spec markdown files (title `# <Name> Actor Specification`) and specs/messages.md defining all protocol messages. Greenfield: scaffold a complete sbt harness project—build.sbt with agents4s-pekko and agents4s-testkit, scripts/setup.sh run.sh test.sh, application.conf, Main.scala, messages.scala generated from messages.md, and one Scala object per actor spec using Scala 3 union types for AcceptedMessages from each actor's name-only ### Receives. Explain how you map Messaging Protocol to case classes.
evals.expected_output: Project layout matches skill boilerplate; messages.scala + each actor object; AcceptedMessages unions; references to project-boilerplate and actor-translation-guide.

assertions.text: SKILL.md instructs scanning specs for `# ... Actor Specification` first heading
SKILL.md defines AcceptedMessages as Scala 3 union of receives + internal/LLM completions
project-boilerplate.md documents build.sbt, scripts, application.conf, and classpath prompts under src/main/resources/prompts/
actor-translation-guide.md explains messages.scala from specs/messages.md, name-only ### Receives in actor specs, and AcceptedMessages union construction

evals.prompt: We already have a working harness. I added specs/01-new-validator.md as a new actor specification linked from the parent Workflow. Add the new actor with minimal edits to the parent only—no full rewrite.
evals.expected_output: Incremental guidance: new object file, extend parent AcceptedMessages/spawn routing; skill Step 2 and Step 1 graph.

assertions.text: SKILL.md describes incremental adds and parent spawn/routing updates
SKILL.md Step 1 builds subagent graph from Workflow spawn links

evals.prompt: Implement only the agentic slice: one actor workflow step is `(Agentic Step)` and must use CursorAgent + LLMActor with structured JSON output. Use default model unless I say otherwise.
evals.expected_output: LLMActor.start, messageAdapter, O with ReadWriter+JsonSchema, composer-2-fast default, PromptTemplate + src/main/resources/prompts/, agent.stop ownership; details in library-api.md.

assertions.text: SKILL.md Step 5 specifies LLMActor + CursorAgent and default model composer-2-fast
library-api.md documents LLMActor.start, LLMError, Agent lifecycle, and PromptTemplate
SKILL forbids awaitIdle/sendPrompt/start on parent receiveMessage thread for LLM work
